_meta.note: trw2-newyork (2026-07-23, nominal 15:00 UK, actual start ~15:09 UK/14:09 UTC, drift ~9min - within normal tolerance). Carry-over bar-walk on all 5 London setups resolved a rough-then-strong run: sig-123 JP225 SL_HIT (bar 12:30Z, low 65649.5 vs SL 65750), sig-126 XAUUSD MISSED (TP1 pre-trigger @ 11:30Z, low 4073.2 - entry zone 4110.61-4115.84 never touched, thesis validated to TP2 anyway), sig-128 NAS100 SL_HIT (bar 09:00Z, high 28971.6 vs SL 28965, whipsaw before the broader move resumed), sig-127 GER40 TP2_HIT (TP1 12:45Z close 24846, TP2 13:00-13:15Z close 24756.5) and sig-129 SP500 TP2_HIT (TP1 12:30Z close 7441.45, TP2 13:00Z close 7429.2) both ran cleanly to both targets. Peak loss streak hit 4 in a row intraday (07:00-12:30 UTC chronological resolution order) before being broken by the two TP2 wins around 13:00 UTC - current streak at publication time is 0 (informational only, no gating, see loss-streak flag rule). Krok 0: DXY 101.466 (up from London 101.03), VIX 19.02 (up from 17.75, regime shifting toward elevated but not fear), macro_conflict false. ECB Main Refinancing Rate + Press Conference (13:15/13:45 UK) both published during the gap - held rates unchanged at 2.40% exactly matching forecast, no surprise/reaction, outside NO-ENTRY window by publication time. WebSearch confirms continued Middle East escalation (US strikes on Iran, Houthi attacks on Saudi tankers, Strait of Hormuz/Red Sea blockade risk) and hawkish Fed repricing (78% probability of September hike) - both themes from the London run are intact and strengthening. XAU guarantee slot refilled fresh (sig-130 SHORT, standard-tier confidence 76, no degradation needed) after sig-126 resolved. TOP3 guarantee met with 3 standard-tier fresh candidates: sig-131 DJ30 SHORT, sig-132 EURUSD SHORT, sig-133 USDJPY LONG (directional diversification - USD strength drove EUR/gold down but JPY down too, i.e. USDJPY up - correctly followed the macro logic rather than forcing all-SHORT). UKOIL still fully parabolic (now +17.89% over the tracked window), continued swing-watch only, not published, unchanged conclusion from Asia/London. RSI H4/H1 XAUUSD still unreadable via data_get_study_values (no RSI indicator active on any chart this run) - now 15th+ consecutive session.

scenario_schema.sl_update_direction_rule: reduce_risk_only: LONG -> new_sl > current_sl AND new_sl < entry_lower; SHORT -> new_sl < current_sl AND new_sl > entry_upper
scenario_schema.screenshot_m15_path_doc: Path to the SS7b M15 standard screenshot. Must be <id>_m15_standard_<ts>.png with companion _meta.json (TF=15, has_entry_box, has_sl_line, has_tp_lines). Written by bar-walk after capture_screenshot. H1 or non-standard screenshots must NOT be stored here -- use null until SS7b is run.

flags_doc.applied: set true once trigger fires -- prevents re-application
flags_doc.one_shot: always true -- each scenario fires at most once
flags_doc.disabled: set true by mutually_exclusive_with when a sibling fires
flags_doc.mutually_exclusive_with: list of scenario keys to disable when this one fires

scenario_schema.precondition_doc: optional -- a bar matching precondition type/level must appear BEFORE the main trigger bar (chronological order enforced)
